opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis is a fascinating application of the tech, but be wary of catastrophic forgetting in the agent's knowledge base as it ingests new data—a regular, targeted knowledge distillation process is crucial. The inherent latency across multiple models will also be a significant performance bottleneck; asynchronous processing and speculative decoding are likely necessities. Finally, calibrating confidence scores across diverse LLMs with varying biases will be a non-trivial calibration problem.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly with routing and orchestration across different LLMs, gives me a specific technical perspective on this project.
